quick_test_scripts.name: Common Cold
script: I have a runny nose and I've been sneezing a lot
Yes, I also have a sore throat
No fever, just feeling tired

quick_test_scripts.name: Influenza
script: I have a high fever and body aches
It started two days ago. I also have a headache and chills
Yes, I have a dry cough

quick_test_scripts.name: Migraine
script: I have a severe headache on one side of my head
Yes, light bothers me and I feel nauseous
It's been going on for about 4 hours

quick_test_scripts.name: Allergies
script: My eyes are itchy and watery, and I keep sneezing
It happens mostly when I'm outside. No fever
Yes, my nose is congested too

quick_test_scripts.name: Gastroenteritis
script: I have stomach pain and diarrhea
Started yesterday after eating. I also feel nauseous
Yes, I vomited once and have a slight fever

quick_test_scripts.name: Strep Throat
script: My throat hurts really bad when I swallow
Yes, I have a fever and my throat looks red with white spots
No cough, but my neck glands are swollen

quick_test_scripts.name: UTI
script: I have pain when I urinate and need to go frequently
Yes, there's a burning sensation and my urine looks cloudy
No fever or back pain, just the urinary symptoms

quick_test_scripts.name: Emergency - Chest Pain
script: I have severe chest pain
It's spreading to my arm and I'm sweating
Should I go to the hospital?

usage_instructions: Copy each script array and paste messages one at a time into Retell AI simulation
